You surge a burst of flame forward, engulfing your foes. 3/day you may use the move Flamethrower.

Flamethrower - Ranged(20ft beam) Fire Special Attack: 3/day 3d10. On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Burned.

Mirage.effect: When you're lit up, the waves of heat that you emit can cause others to miss with their attacks aimed at you. Whenever you are attacked by a foe with a ranged attack who acts after you during a round of combat, if you used a Fire-type move on your turn, the foe's accuracy check is -2.

Solar Beam.effect:
You harness the warmth of the sun and unleash it on your foes, devastating them. 1/day you may use the move Solar Beam. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Solar Beam's frequency.

Solar Beam - Ranged(30ft beam) Grass Special Attack: 1/day 5d12. When you use this attack you immediately end your turn unless it's Sunny. During your next turn, or immediately if it's Sunny, you may target with and roll Solar Beam's Accuracy Check and damage.

Fire Blast.effect:
You open your heart to your foes and burn them down. 1/day you may use the move Fire Blast. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Fire Blast's frequency.

Fire Blast - Ranged(40ft, 10ft blast) Fire Special Attack: 1/day 5d12. Fire Blast has -2 during Accuracy Check unless it's Sunny. On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the targets are Burned.

Psychometry.effect: As your power expands in unexpected ways, you learn to grab things with your telekinesis even if you can't see it! You may target objects that you know of, but cannot necessarily see, with your telekinesis. You need to have a general idea of where it is and it must still be within the range of your telekinesis. In addition, you may add your Special Attack modifier instead of your Speed modifier if you want to during your accuracy checks for effect moves. You may not use more than eight different Psychic and/or Psychic advanced class moves per day.

Terrify.effect:
You create a terrifying image in the mind of a poor victim to your terrible tricks. 1/day you may use the move Glare.

Glare - Ranged(20ft) Normal Effect: 1/day. On hit, the target becomes Paralyzed.

Probability Control.effect: You pull at strings of fate with your strange psychic powers. Once per turn, as a free action, you may reroll any one of your own dice at the cost of 5 HP. The second time you use Probability Control per day you will lose 10 HP, then 15 HP, then 20 HP, increasing 5 times each time you use it per day.

Curse.effect:
You weave a terrible curse on a foe then pay the price to drain your target. 1/day you may use the move Curse. Curse can only target Pokémon and when you use it, you are treated as Ghost-type Pokémon. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Curse's frequency.

Curse - Ranged(20ft) Ghost Effect: 1/day. Curse can only be used by Ghost-Type Pokémon. On hit, you lose hit points equal to 1/3rd of your max HP, then the target is Cursed.

Make it Weird.effect:
Your manic mood releases strange psychic powers that warp the space around you. 3/day you can use the moves Gravity, Magic Room, Trick Room, or Wonder Room.

Gravity - Psychic Field Effect: 3/day. You create a circle of Gravity Terrain with a 60ft diameter. Within the terrain, Pokémon may not leave the ground and any Pokémon that are in the air are brought down to the ground. This terrain disappears after 2 mins.

Magic Room - Psychic Field Effect: 3/day. You create a circle of Magical Terrain with a 60ft diameter. If within the Magical terrain, Pokémon cannot use any held items. This terrain disappears after 2 mins.

Trick Room - Psychic Field Effect: 3/day. You create a circle of Tricky Terrain with a 60ft diameter. Within the Tricky terrain, turn orders are reversed during each round. If some are outside of Tricky terrain while others are within Tricky terrain, all actions are still made in reverse order. This terrain disappears after 2 mins.

Wonder Room - Psychic Field Effect: 3/day. You create a circle of Wonderful Terrain with a 60ft diameter. Anyone who attacks within the Wonderful terrain makes Attack Accuracy Checks against Special Defense and Special Attack Accuracy Checks against Defense. This terrain disappears after 2 mins.

Discombobulate.effect:
You spin their mind with the flick of your wrist and a curse under your breath. 1/day you may use the move Confuse Ray. If a foe you Confused knocks themselves out during a failed Confusion check, you may use Discombobulate an additional time that day.

Confuse Ray - Ranged(20ft) Ghost Effect: 1/day. On hit, the target becomes Confused.

Burning Malediction.effect:
Dark mutterings and the wave of your hand sends out a terrible wisp of fire into your foes. 1/day you may use the move Will-O-Wisp. If a foe you Burned is knocked out by their Burn, you may use Burning Malediction an additional time that day.

Will-O-Wisp - Ranged(10ft) Fire Effect: 1/day. On hit, the target is Burned.

Hypnotize.effect:
You enter into the minds of others and think of a deep sleep. 3/day you may use the move Hypnosis. If the target wakes up before the end of your next turn, you may use Hypnotize an additional time that day.

Hypnosis - Ranged(10ft) Psychic Effect: 3/day. Hypnosis has -4 during Accuracy Check. On hit, the target is put Asleep.

Fumble.effect: You rip at strings of fate, sowing discord and mayhem. Once per turn, as a free action, you may have a foe reroll a successful accuracy check or skill check by losing 15 HP.

Binding Spell.effect:
You mutter ill will and trap the target in place. 1/day you may use the move Shadow Tag.

Shadow Tag - Ranged(10ft) Psychic Effect: 1/day. On hit, the target is bound in place. Ghost Pokémon are immune to Shadow Tag.

Shared Trauma.effect:
You grab onto another, reflecting each other's pains onto each other and sharing them evenly. 1/day you can use the move Pain Split. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Shared Trauma's frequency.

Pain Split - Melee Normal Effect: 1/day. On hit, you and target's current HPs are added together and halved, assigning both you and the target that new value. Neither can have their new HPs be more than their Max.

Ruin.effect: Your psychic spell work flows naturally as the wave of your arms bring destruction to your enemies. 3/day you may use two moves gained through Hex Maniac features targeting the same foe as one action. Roll each accuracy check separately.

Hydrodynamics.effect: When you're submerged in water, you shoot through swimming faster than many Water-type Pokémon. You move through water at your movement speed and hold your breath for 10 minutes at a time without needing to make any skill checks. In addition, add your Speed modifier multiplied by 5ft to your movement speed per turn while in water.

Hydrokinesis.effect:
Pulling all the moisture in the air together allows you to create water and manipulate it. You can manipulate water in many ways, for example; as an action you could part a Small path in a pool, as an action move a tub full of water up to 30ft away, or as an action create a Tiny puddle of water. In addition, you may use the move Water Gun. You may not use more than eight different Psychic and/or Psychic advanced class moves per day.

Water Gun - Ranged(20ft) Water Special Attack: At-Will 2d6.

Surface Tension.effect: Water works for you, supporting your weight as you run across open water. You treat the surface of water as normal terrain, no matter how choppy it may be. In addition, anyone else who you are holding with your hands can also cross the surface of water as if it is normal terrain.

Rain Dance.effect:
You can pull raindrops right out of the sky, blanketing the surrounding area in rain. 3/day you can use the move Rain Dance.

Rain Dance - Water Field Effect: 3/day. You create a circle of Raining Weather with a 60ft diameter. Within the Raining weather, Water-type attacks deal an additional 8 damage and Fire-type attacks deal 8 less damage. This weather disappears after 2 mins.

Bubble Beam.effect:
You gather together orbs of water and throw it forward, causing the bubbles to explode on impact. 3/day you may use the move Bubble Beam.

Bubble Beam - Ranged(20ft beam) Water Special Attack: 3/day 3d8. On hit, the target's Speed is -1 for 10 mins.

Cryokinesis.effect:
As a hydrokinetic's power grows they learn to manipulate the temperature of the water they control. You can manipulate water by turning it into ice in many ways, for example; as an action you could create a Medium sized wall of ice up to 30ft away, as an action create a Huge space of ice on the floor where there was water, or as an action melt a Medium sized area of ice. In addition, you may use the move Powder Snow. You may not use more than eight different Psychic and/or Psychic advanced class moves per day.

Powder Snow - Ranged(5ft burst) Ice Special Attack: At-Will 1d12. On hit, if you got 19 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Frozen.

Hail Storm.effect:
You chill the air and bring forth a dangerous hailstorm. 3/day you may use Hail. In addition, you are immune to Hail's damaging effect.

Hail - Ice Field Effect: 3/day. You create a circle of Hailing Weather with a 60ft diameter. Anyone who acts within the Hailing weather takes 2d4 damage after acting unless they are Ice Type. This weather disappears after 2 mins.

Hydro Therapy.effect: Using your familiarity with water, you work to help heal those around you by soothing wounds or diluting harmful substances. 3/day, as two consecutive actions, you may cure an adjacent ally of a Burn, Confusion, Freezing, Poison, or Toxin.

Ice Beam.effect:
You throw a terrible beam of cold from your hands, freezing your target in place. 3/day you may use the move Ice Beam. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Ice Beam's frequency.

Ice Beam - Ranged(20ft beam) Ice Special Attack: 3/day 3d10. On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Frozen.

Scald.effect:
You've learned to manipulate the temperature of the water around you in a different way and can boil the water you control if only for moments at a time. 3/day you may use the move Scald. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Scald's frequency.

Scald - Ranged(10ft) Water Special Attack: 3/day 3d10. On hit, if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Burned. Scald can Burn Fire-types.

Blizzard.effect:
By reaching forward you create shards of ice and slice up everything in your way. 1/day you may use the move Blizzard. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Blizzard's frequency.

Blizzard - Ranged(20ft, 10ft wave) Ice Special Attack: 1/day 5d12. Blizzard has -2 during Accuracy Check unless it's Hailing. On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the targets are Frozen.

Hydro Surge.effect:
You release a powerful force of water that tears away at your enemies. 1/day you may use the move Hydro Surge. Psionic Maelstrom does not let you ignore Hydro Surge's frequency.

Hydro Surge - Ranged(30ft beam, 10ft blast) Water Special Attack: 1/day 5d12. If it's Raining, Hydro Surge has +2 during Accuracy Check.

Earthquake.description: Powerful ground attack hitting all nearby

abilities.Weak Armor: When you are hit by a melee attack, your Defense is -3 and your Speed is +3 for 10 mins.

abilities.Early Bird: You roll twice during checks to wake from Sleep and use the higher result.
abilities.Effect Spore: Whenever you are hit with a melee attack, roll 1d4. On 4, randomly either Paralyze, Poison, or put to Sleep the attacker.
abilities.Dry Skin: In sunny weather, you lose 4 HP at the end of your actions. In rainy weather, you recover 4 HP at the end of your actions. You are immune to Water-type attacks.
abilities.Sticky Hold: You cannot drop held items or have held items stolen from you.
abilities.Insomnia: You are immune to being put to Sleep.
abilities.Swift Swim: While in Raining weather or in water, your Speed is +2.
abilities.Stakeout: When you attack a target who has just joined the encounter since your last turn, you deal +4 damage.
abilities.Wonder Skin: Your stats cannot be lowered by a foe's effects.
abilities.Emergency Exit: You cannot fight when first damaged below half of Max HP. You will want to run away or return to a Poke Ball for 2 rounds. During those two rounds, your speed is doubled.
abilities.Infiltrator: Hindering terrain and Walls do not affect you or your attacks.
abilities.Wonder Guard: Shedinja is immune to attacks that are not super-effective. Wonder Guard cannot be removed, ignored, or disabled by any means.
abilities.Steadfast: When you are Stunned, your Speed is +1 for 10 mins.
abilities.Hyper Cutter: Your Attack cannot be lowered by a foe's effects.
abilities.Mold Breaker: Your attacks ignore any passives that would redirect, negate or weaken your attacks.
abilities.Exposed: When you move or use an attack, you have �8 Defense and �8 Special Defense until your next turn. You also deal �8 damage with all attacks.
abilities.Prankster: Your attacks that do not deal damage on hit have Priority.
abilities.Pickpocket: When you are hit by a melee attack, you steal the offender's held item, if any.
abilities.Supreme Overlord: When you join combat, your Attack and Special Attack are each raised +1 for each ally who has already been knocked out in the current encounter, for 10 mins. Supreme Overlord can only raise your Attack and Special Attack each up to +4.
abilities.Suction Cups: You cannot be moved by a foe's attacks.
abilities.Guard Dog: If a foe's effect would cause you to flee or be moved, instead your Attack is raised +1 for 10 mins.
abilities.Fur Coat: If hit by a move using the Attack stat, you only take half the damage you would take.
abilities.Rattled: When a foe hits you with a Bug-type, Ghost-type, or Dark-type attack, your Speed is +1 for 10 mins. This can stack.
abilities.Super Luck: Attacks are critical hits on natural 1820
abilities.Limber: You are immune to being Paralyzed.
abilities.Thick Fat: You take -4 damage from Fire-type attacks and Icetype attacks.
abilities.Keen Eye: Your accuracy checks cannot be negatively affected by foes.
abilities.Big Pecks: Your Defense cannot be lowered by a foe's effects.
abilities.Illusion: As a free action, you may change your appearance to look like any Pok�mon you have interacted with within the past hour. You may not appear as a Pok�mon more than twice your size and the illusion is dropped when you are hit by an attack.
abilities.Justified: When a foe hits you with a Dark-type attack, your Attack is +1 for 10 mins.
abilities.Rock Head: Your attacks that damage yourself on hit do not damage yourself.
abilities.Multiscale: When you are at Max HP, you take �4 damage from all attacks.

abilities.Thermal Exchange: You are immune to being Burned. When you are hit by a Fire-type attack, your Attack is +2 for 10 mins.
abilities.Sand Veil: While in Sandstorming Weather, any foe's attacks made against you have -1 during accuracy check and you don't take damage from Sandstorming weather.
abilities.Rough Skin: Whenever you are hit with a melee attack, the attacker takes 4 damage.
abilities.Sap Sipper: You are immune to Grasstype attacks. If you would be hit by a Grass-type attack, your Attack is +2 for 10 mins.
abilities.Soundproof: You are immune to sound-based attacks.
abilities.Natural Cure: Whenever returned to a Poke Ball, you are cured of any afflictions.
abilities.Cloud Nine: As a free action you may deplete one use of Defog and use Defog.
abilities.Regenerator: When returned to a Poke Ball, you recover to Max HP after being stored for 1 hour.

abilities.Storm Drain: Any foe's ranged Water-type attacks within 25ft or any adjacent foe's Water-type attacks are negated and drawn to you. Your Special Attack is +2 until the end of your next turn whenever you negate a Water-type attack.
abilities.Vital Spirit: You are immune to being put to Sleep.
abilities.Motor Drive: Any Electrictype attack that hits you is negated and your speed is +1 for 10 mins. This can stack.
abilities.Analytic: When attacking a foe who has already acted this round, deal +4 damage.
abilities.Plus: If at least one ally has Plus or Minus within 10ft of you, you have +3 Special Attack.
abilities.Minus: If at least one ally has Plus or Minus within 10ft of you, you have +3 Special Attack.
abilities.Electromorphosis: When hit by an attack that deals damage, you may use the move Charge as a free action
abilities.Punk Rock: Your sound-based attacks deal +4 damage. You take 4 less damage from sound-based attacks.
abilities.Aftermath: When knocked out by a melee attack, the attacker loses 1d20 hit points.
abilities.Wind Power: When hit by a wind based attack, you may use the move Charge as a free action
abilities.Slush Rush: While in Hailing weather, your Speed is +2. and you don't take damage from Hailing weather
abilities.Sand Rush: While in Sandstorming Weather, your Speed is +2 and you don't take damage from Sandstorming weather.

abilities.Electric Surge: As a free action you may deplete one use of Electric Terrain and use Electric Terrain.
abilities.Iron Barbs: Whenever you are hit with a melee attack, the attacker takes 4 damage.
abilities.Magic Guard: Foes can only deal damage to you with attacks that deal damage. You are unaffected by damage from afflictions, coats, hazards, weather or any passives given by foes.
abilities.Flower Veil: You and your allied Grass-type's stats cannot be lowered by effects within 25ft of you.
abilities.Symbiosis: You can pass held items to allies within 10ft as a free action.
abilities.Own Tempo: You are immune to being Confused
abilities.Aroma Veil: You and your allies within 10ft of you are immune to the effects of the moves Heal Block, Taunt, Encore, and Disable and the passive Cursed Body.
abilities.Well-Baked Body: You are immune to Fire-type attacks. When you are hit by Fire-type attacks, instead your Defense is +2 for 10 mins.
abilities.Healer: After acting, you may roll 1d20. On 16 or higher, any adjacent allies are cured of all afflictions.
abilities.Triage: Any moves you know that can heal have Priority.
abilities.No Guard: You cannot miss your attacks, and attacks made against you cannot miss.
abilities.Anger Point: When hit by a critical hit, raise Attack +6 for 10 mins.
abilities.Scrappy: Your Normaltype and Fighting-type attacks can hit Ghost-type targets.
abilities.Poison Touch: Whenever you hit with a melee attack, you may roll 1d6. On 6, Poison the target.
abilities.Battle Armor: Critical hits are treated as normal hits against you.
abilities.Receiver: When an ally is knocked out within 10ft of you, you gain one of your ally's passives for 2 mins.

abilities.Zen Mode: Darmanitan changes to its Zen Mode when it is at or below half of its max HP.
abilities.Solid Rock: Super-effective attacks against you deal �4 damage.
abilities.White Smoke: Your stats cannot be lowered by a foe's effects.
abilities.Magma Armor: You are immune to being Frozen.
abilities.Drought: As a free action you may deplete one use of Sunny Day and use Sunny Day.
abilities.Mirror Armor: If your stats would be lowered by a foe's effects, instead that offender's stat is lowered.
abilities.Costar: At the start of combat, copy a stat passive from your nearest ally until the end of combat.
abilities.Tangled Feet: While you are confused, any foe's attacks made against you have -1 during accuracy check.
abilities.Perish Body: When you are hit by a melee attack, the offender receives 3 Perish Coats. The Coat has the following ability: After acting, destroy one of your Perish Coats. If this is the third Perish Coat you've destroyed this way during this encounter, set your HP to 0.
abilities.Flare Boost: While Burned, your Special Attack is +4.
abilities.Fluffy: If hit by a melee attack, you only take half the damage. If hit by a Fire-type attack, you take twice the damage.
abilities.Harvest: When using a Berry, you only use half of it while still gaining its full effects. You can only use half of a Berry if you have Harvest.
abilities.Water Compaction: When a foe hits you with a Water-type attack, your Defense is +2 for 10 mins.
abilities.Mummy: Whenever you are hit with a melee attack, the ability passives of the attacker become Mummy for 10 mins.
abilities.Disguise: The first time you are hit with an attack each encounter, the attack is negated.
abilities.Queenly Majesty: You may not be targeted by Priority moves that are being used out of turn order.
abilities.Seed Sower: When you are hit by an attack that dealt damage, as a free action you may deplete one use of Grassy Terrain and use Grassy Terrain immediately.

abilities.Wind Rider: You are immune to wind based attacks. If you would be hit by a wind based attack, your Attack is +1 for 10 mins instead.
abilities.Flower Gift: While Cherrim is in Sunny Weather, Cherrim's Attack and Special Defense is +6.
abilities.Hospitality: 1/day, the first time you move adjacent to an ally per encounter, they are healed 12 HP.
abilities.Heatproof: Fire-type attacks are resisted by you. If you are already resistant to Fire-type, remove an additional damage die.
abilities.Poison Heal: While afflicted with Poison or Toxification, you are healed instead of damaged by those afflictions. You are cured of Poison or Toxin once you are at Max HP.
abilities.Grass Pelt: While in Grassy Terrain, your Defense is +2.

abilities.Ripen: When you use a Berry, double any effects it has.

Z-Ring.effect: Harnesses Z-Crystal power. Use a Z-Move once per day as an entire action. Requires Pokemon loyalty 2+

Z-Crystal.effect: Type-specific crystal used with a Z-Ring. Enables Z-Moves of the matching type; some enable species-specific Z-Moves

Tera Orb.effect: Terastallize one Pokemon per day for up to 10 minutes. Improves defensive stats and changes type

Dynamax Band.effect: Contains Wishing Stars. Dynamax or Gigantamax one Pokemon per day within 500 ft of a Power Spot. Multiplies max HP by 5 for 1 minute

Ranger Styler.effect: Temporarily command wild Pokemon. Requires Ranger status; illegal to buy or sell. Requires 2 min/week charging at a Ranger or Pokemon Center

Snag Machine.effect: Glove allowing capture of trainer-owned Pokemon. Lower loyalty = easier capture. Does not work on Pokemon with loyalty 3+. Illegal to buy or sell

Pokemon Box Link.effect: Wirelessly access PC Boxes. Deposit/withdraw Pokemon and facilitate GTS trades. 1 minute per exchange; requires 3 hours charging per week

Pokedex.effect: Wrist-worn or handheld smart device. Fast-identifying camera, voice commands, audio readout. ~100 models available

Repel.effect: Wild Pokemon avoid the user for 1 hour (may ignore to protect territory)

Super Repel.effect: Wild Pokemon avoid the user for 3 hours (may ignore to protect territory)

TM (At-Will).effect: Teach a Pokemon an At-Will frequency move. 3 uses per TM

TM (3/day).effect: Teach a Pokemon a 3/day frequency move. 3 uses per TM

TM (1/day).effect: Teach a Pokemon a 1/day frequency move. 3 uses per TM

TR.effect: Technical Record. Teaches a Pokemon a move (single use). Costs half the price of the equivalent TM

HM.effect: Hidden Machine. Rare item teaching a Pokemon a move. Very difficult to find

Full Plate Armor.effect: +2 DEF on accuracy checks, -10ft movement. (20 lbs)

Nimble Spandex.effect: +1 SDEF on accuracy checks made against you. (1 lb)

Dragonhide Armor.effect: +1 Sp. Def during accuracy checks (1 lb)

Arctic Wetsuit.effect: Cold resistant; no damage in arctic water. +4 Constitution for cold endurance

All-Sight Helmet.effect: +4 Perception in darkness, fog, or visual obstacles

Biome Camouflage.effect: +4 Stealth in matching terrain (snow, desert, swamp, grassland, or mountain)

Cleated Boots.effect: Movement unhindered by muddy or slippery terrain

Cross-country Skis.effect: +15 ft movement on snow or sand; other terrain treated as difficult

Divers Suit.effect: Swimsuit for temperate waters with flippers; movement unhindered underwater

Ice Vest.effect: +4 Constitution for desert or volcanic heat

Rebreather.effect: Underwater breathing for 30 minutes per charge; must be cleaned after each use (1 hr downtime)

Rollerblades.effect: +15 ft movement on smooth surfaces; rough terrain treated as difficult

Snow Treks.effect: Treat ice and snow as normal terrain

Blizzard Wear.effect: Take no damage from Hailing weather

Desert Gear.effect: Take no damage from Sandstorming weather

Wet Suit.effect: Insulated wetsuit; take no damage in arctic temperatures

Diving Gear.effect: Self-contained underwater breathing apparatus; 2 hours of air, refillable via solar power

Trainer's Pack.effect: Solar charger, adapter, compression bands (4), bandages (4), screwdriver, water bottle, pack (5 lbs)

Traveler's Pack.effect: Pop-up tent, tarp, sleeping bag, knife, flashlight, compass, matches, water bottle, compression sack (15 lbs)

Medical Field Kit.effect: Pain relievers, antihistamine, cold/flu medicine, electrolyte tablets, antiseptic, bandages, gauze, thermometer, scissors, tweezers (10 lbs)

Fishing Kit.effect: Telescoping rod, reel lines (2), hooks (100), bobbers, sinkers, lures, tackle box (8 lbs)

Grooming Kit.effect: Trimmer, combs, brushes, scissors, clippers, nail file, soap, shampoo (4 lbs)

Cooking Kit.effect: Electric stove (2 burners), cast iron pan/pot, water purifier, cutting board, knife, measuring cups, spatula (35 lbs)

Engineer's Tool Kit.effect: Soldering table, soldering iron, desoldering pump, electrical tools (15 lbs)

Dig Kit.effect: Extendable shovel, pickaxe, hammer, trowel, compass, measuring tape, stakes, string (15 lbs)

Drawing Kit.effect: Drawing pad, journal, pencils, pens, brush pens, bag (4 lbs)

Mess Kit.effect: Plate, bowl, fork, spoon, knife, cup (1.5 lbs)

Miscreant's Pack.effect: Solar charger, memory sticks, lock picks, screwdriver, hammer, crowbar, saw, mirror, wire, water bottle (10 lbs)

Poke Ball Smith Kit.effect: Soldering tools, wire (80 ft), micro screwdriver, screws (400), glass (200), rods (200), steel sheets (200) (15 lbs)

Portable Chemistry Set.effect: Bunsen burner, beakers, flasks, test tubes, spray bottles, thermometer, mortar and pestle (12 lbs)

Sewing Kit.effect: Folding sewing machine, thread spools, needles, fabric pens, pins, scissors, seam ripper (20 lbs)

Make Up Kit.effect: Moisturizer, primers, concealers, foundation, blush, powder, lipsticks, lash curler, case (4 lbs)

Spiritualist Pack.effect: Solar charger, religious texts, candles (10), incense (20), matches, water bottle, pack (5 lbs)

Studious Pack.effect: Solar charger, binder, folders, notebooks, pens, highlighter, ruler, headphones, water bottle, pack (10 lbs)

Egg Incubator.effect: Electronic container for Pokemon Eggs. Waterproof, survives 100 ft drops (15 lbs)

Portable Berry Planter.effect: Plant a berry; Nature check when planting; daily watering yields 1-3 berries (3 lbs)

Solar Charger.effect: Unfolding solar panel that charges phones and computers. Does not hold a charge itself

Backup Solar Battery.effect: Rechargeable backup battery; charges up to 4 devices before running out

Ball (Play).effect: Soft, bouncy ball for fetch and play

Ball (Durable).effect: Tough ball resistant to sharp teeth and extreme temperatures

Campfire Set.effect: Waterproof lighter, fire starters, collapsible stand, tinfoil, canteen

Curry Campfire Kit.effect: Galarian curry supplies: curry pot, stand, fan, ladle, ingredients for 3 pots (4 lbs)

Tea Campfire Kit.effect: Metal teapot, 4 reusable mugs, 2 teabag boxes (2 lbs)

Chew/String Toy.effect: Various shapes and sizes for Pokemon enrichment

Chew/String Toy (Tough).effect: Difficult-to-destroy toy designed for carnivorous Pokemon

Frisbee.effect: Plastic disk for fetch; available in various colors

Tray Feeder.effect: Elevated collapsible feeder. Attracts Pokemon to the area with bait (10 lbs)

Feeder Fruit.effect: Bait that attracts avian, Bug-type, and furry Pokemon

Feeder Nectar.effect: Bait that attracts avian, Bug-type, and Grass-type Pokemon

Feeder Seeds.effect: Bait that attracts avian and small furry Pokemon

Nintendo Switch.effect: Video game system. Games cost 20-80 P; some playable with Pokemon (includes case and charging cable)

Chainmail.effect: +1 DEF on accuracy checks made against you. (10 lbs)

Heavy Full Plate.effect: +3 DEF on accuracy checks, -20ft movement. (50 lbs)

Wood Staff.effect: Branch Poke - Melee Grass At-Will 2d6. Requires Weapons Master.

Stone Fist.effect: Stone Smash - Melee Rock At-Will 2d6. Requires Weapons Master.

Steel Blade.effect: Steel Strike - Melee Steel At-Will 2d6. Requires Weapons Master.

Alluring.description: Pokemon who are alluring smell very pleasant. They may attract wild Pokemon easily. Attention is commonly turned toward fragrant, alluring Pokemon by wilds. If a Pokemon learns the move Aromatherapy or Sweet Scent and does not have the alluring skill, they gain alluring.

Amorphous.description: Amorphous Pokemon have an inconsistent shape. They can flatten and reform themselves like gel. They can stretch out their body material and condense themselves as well. By doing this, a Pokemon can access places others couldn't, or bypass a door or two, only to let their non-amorphous friends in afterwards.
Amorphous.shortDescription: Can change their body into a liquid-like state.

Beached.description: When a Pokemon has the beached skill, they need to stay in water. Beached means the Pokemon has a hard time battling when not submerged in water. For every round of an encounter the Pokemon is not at least halfway submerged in water, they lose 10% of their max HP. If the Pokemon is lowered to -100% HP for more than 10 rounds of combat, make a deaths savings roll as usual. Beached Pokemon can calmly remain out of water.

Burrow.description: Pokemon with burrow can quickly dig through solid earth, rock, clay, or even soft sand. When moving through any earth, burrowing Pokemon treat underground as normal terrain, without penalizing their movement speed. If a Pokemon learns the move Dig and does not have the burrow skill, they gain burrow.

Chilled.description: Chilled Pokemon are always cold to the touch.

Climber.description: Pokemon with an aptitude for climbing, or just many sticky legs, treat vertical terrain and even ceiling surfaces as normal terrain that they can navigate without affecting their movement speed.
Climber.shortDescription: Treats walls and ceilings as normal terrain.

Firestarter.description: A Pokemon who has the firestarter skill can produce flames. They can control how lightly or powerfully they produce the fire, creating puffs of fire the size of a lighter or a large burst of fire capable of engulfing a tree. If a Pokemon learns the move Blast Burn, Blaze Kick, Ember, Fiery Dance, Fire Blast, Fire Fang, Fire Lash, Fire Punch, Fire Spin, Flame Burst, Flame Charge, Flame Wheel, Flamethrower, Flare Blitz, Heat Crash, Heat Wave, or Incinerate and does not have the firestarter Skill, they gain firestarter.

Flight.description: Pokemon with flight are not bound to the ground. Through means of wings, or psychic ability, or electromagnetic levitation, these Pokemon can remain in the air for hours at a time, sometimes never needing to return to the ground. These Pokemon can use their movement speeds in the air. If a Pokemon learns the move Fly and does not have the flight Skill, they gain flight.

Flopper.description: A Pokemon with the flopper Skill probably doesn't like being out of water. While it's not dangerous to move around on, a flopper treats all normal terrain as difficult terrain and all difficult terrain as blocking terrain. If anything modifies how a Pokemon moves making movement easier, Pokemon with flopper will still treat difficult terrain as difficult terrain but can then flop around on normal terrain without trouble.
Flopper.shortDescription: Treats dry land as special terrain.

Fountain.description: A Pokemon who has the fountain skill can produce freshwater. They can control how lightly or powerfully they produce the water, sprinkling water or forcefully shooting water with the strength of a fire hose. If a Pokemon learns the move Hydro Cannon, Hydro Pump, Liquidation, Scald, Soak, Water Gun, Water Pulse, Waterfall, or Whirlpool and does not have the fountain Skill, they gain fountain.

Freezer.description: When a Pokemon has the freezer skill, they can produce ice at a controlled rate. They can make puffs of snow, or ice cubes, or spread icicles across surfaces. As their action, a Pokemon with freezer can target an area on the ground and slowly turn it into icy, difficult terrain. They can make one 5x5 ft. area into icy or fluffy snowy difficult terrain per 6 seconds. If a Pokemon learns the move Aurora Beam, Blizzard, Freeze-Dry, Frost Breath, Ice Beam, Ice Fang, Ice Punch, Icy Wind, Powder Snow, or Sheer Cold, and does not have the freezer skill, they gain freezer.

Gilled.description: A gilled Pokemon can breathe underwater. It never needs to come up for air, remaining underwater for as long as it wants to.

Glow.description: A Pokemon with the glow skill can emit light from a part of its body. Depending on the variety of wild Pokemon nearby, it might attract Pokemon or ward them away. If a Pokemon learns the move Flash or stat passive Tail Glow and does not have the glow skill, they gain glow.

Groundshaper.description: A Pokemon with the groundshaper skill can skillfully and precisely transform the terrain around them to create difficult terrain or flatten out rough terrain to create normal terrain. As their action, a Pokemon with groundshaper can target an area on the ground and slowly turn it into sandy or rock covered difficult terrain, or change difficult terrain into smooth dirt-covered normal terrain. They can make one 5x5 ft. area into difficult terrain or normal terrain per 6 seconds. If a Pokemon learns the move Bulldoze, Earth Power, Earthquake, Sand Tomb, or Stomping Tantrum and does not have the groundshaper Skill, they gain groundshaper.

Guster.description: A Pokemon with the guster skill can create bursts of wind. The power can vary from a light breeze to a powerful burst of air capable of lifting light objects into the air or providing lift for a chute. If a Pokemon learns the move Gust, or Hurricane, or the stat passive Tailwind and does not have the guster Skill, they gain guster.

Heater.description: A Pokemon with the heater skill is always warm when touched.

Hover.description: Hovering Pokemon use some force in order to float above the ground, or even over water, without touching the surface. Whether its magnetic, gravitational, air currents, or some other magical power, it's uncertain what keeps some of these Pokemon in the air, but they can't go higher than 10 ft off the ground while staying airborne indefinitely. If a Pokemon learns the move Magnet Rise and does not have the hover skill, they gain hover.
Hover.shortDescription: Can hover just above the ground.

Inflatable.description: A Pokemon with the skill inflatable can expand its size from tiny to small, small to medium, medium to large, large to huge, or huge to gigantic. They do so by inhaling vast amounts of air or temporarily growing the size of their plant-like bodies. While inflated, a Pokemon does not change its weight. A Pokemon can maintain its larger size for up to 5 mins. If a Pokemon learns the move Stockpile or the stat passive Growth and does not have the inflatable skill, they gain inflatable.
Inflatable.shortDescription: Can expand their body to a larger size.

Intelligence.description: Intelligence marks a Pokemon for higher brain function and often these Pokemon can surpass human intellect. While intelligent Pokemon are capable of independent decisions, they still trust your leadership and will usually wait for your instruction. If you are unconscious or otherwise unable to make decisions, an intelligent Pokemon will act of its own accord, once per round if none of your other Pokemon are acting that round. Intelligent Pokemon are problem solvers and can be dangerous foes if encountered in the wild.
Intelligence.shortDescription: Very smart; capable of independent decisions.

Invisibility.description: Pokemon who have the invisibility skill can turn invisible. Pokemon may not perform moves while invisible. While invisible, foes must roll +4 during accuracy checks to hit you and still need a general idea of where you last were to hit you. When a Pokemon turns invisible, they can only remain invisible for up to 4 minutes. After becoming visible, they must wait two plus the number of minutes they spent invisible before using their invisibility again. You cannot turn invisible in the same turn you've attacked.

Magnetic.description: Magnetic Pokemon can lightly manipulate magnetic fields. With this, they can repel iron and/or steel or attract iron and/or steel, holding it to their body or pushing it away. Through this magnetic manipulation, they can also feel magnetic fields and discern north. If a Pokemon learns the move Magnet Bomb, Magnet Pull, or Magnet Rise and does not have the magnetic Skill, they gain magnetic.

Mind Lock.description: Pokemon who have the skill mind lock cannot have their minds read.

Modular.description: Modular Pokemon are often made up of separate units that make up their body or consciousness. Modular Pokemon can often take up different spaces simultaneously during combat and reshape themselves to fit in different ways at different sizes. Modular Pokemon stats do not change no matter how they are configured. Modular Pokemon cannot separate a part of themselves further than 50 ft from any other part of their body.
Modular.shortDescription: Body consists of multiple separable parts.

Phasing.description: A Pokemon with phasing may move through hindering or blocking terrain without their movement speed being affected. They can turn intangible and move through solid walls or another Pokemon. A Pokemon can remain intangible with phasing for up to 30 seconds. If a Pokemon remains intangible, they may not perform moves during their turn. Attacks that use the Special Attack stat can still target and hit a phasing Pokemon.

Reach.description: A Pokemon with reach may make melee attacks from up to 25 ft. away. Pokemon with reach are either really large or have a stretchy limb with which they can strike foes from a distance.

Repulsive.description: This Pokemon can emit an unpleasant odor that Wild Pokemon find repulsive. Wild Pokemon may ignore this smell to protect something precious to them. If a Pokemon learns the move Corrosive Gas, Gastro Acid, Gunk Shot, Poison Gas, Sludge, Sludge Bomb, Sludge Wave, Smog, or Venom Drench and does not have the repulsive Skill, they gain repulsive.
Repulsive.shortDescription: Repels others with a foul smell.

Shrinkable.description: A Pokemon with the skill shrinkable can shrink its size from gigantic to huge, huge to large, large to medium, medium to small, or small to tiny. While shrunken, a Pokemon may not perform any moves and it does not change its weight. A Pokemon can maintain its smaller size for up to 5 mins. If a Pokemon learns the move Minimize and does not have the shrinkable skill, they gain shrinkable.
Shrinkable.shortDescription: Can shrink their body to a smaller size.

Sinker.description: Sinker means the Pokemon cannot swim, or move while submerged in water. For every round of an encounter the Pokemon is in water that is deep enough for them to stand submerged in, they lose 10% of their max HP. If the Pokemon is lowered to -100% HP for more than 10 rounds of combat, make a deaths savings roll as usual. If a Pokemon gains the swimmer skill, they lose their sinker skill.

Sprouter.description: A Pokemon with the sprouter skill can rapidly influence the growth of plants and flora around them. Over 6 seconds, a sprouter can grow a plant 5 ft taller or wider than it previously was. Through the use of sprouter, the Pokemon can also make plants grow up to twice of the normal size they would become naturally. If a Pokemon learns the move Frenzy Plant, Grass Knot, Ingrain, Leech Seed, or Synthesis and does not have the sprouter Skill, they gain sprouter.

Stealth.description: Not all Pokemon are allowed to make a stealth check. With stealth, Pokemon may roll a stealth check like a human trainer, adding their Speed modifier, calculated like a human's, to see if they can silently move during or outside of battle without being detected.
Stealth.shortDescription: Can make Stealth skill checks to hide.

Strength.description: A Pokemon with the strength skill is exceptionally strong, physically. With little effort, they can lift and move things vastly heavier than themselves. If they are featherweight, they can easily lift medium weights; if light weight, they can easily lift heavy weights; if medium weight, they can easily lift over 400-600 lbs.; at heavy weight, they can easily lift over 800-1000 lbs.; superweights with strength can lift or push up to 1000-1500 lbs. If a Pokemon learns the move Strength, they gain the strength skill.
Strength.shortDescription: Very strong; can move very heavy objects.

Swimmer.description: A swimmer loves the water. They treat knee-deep water as normal terrain as well as anything deeper than that. Swimmers are not always gilled, so make sure they're coming up for air when they need to.

Telekinetic.description: Telekinetic Pokemon can move objects with their mind. They can lift things that are lighter than themselves. They can move objects up to 25 ft. away. If a Pokemon learns the move Confusion, Extrasensory, Psychic, or Trick and does not have the telekinetic skill, they gain telekinetic.
Telekinetic.shortDescription: Can move things with their mind.

Telepath.description: A telepathic Pokemon can read the minds of people and other Pokemon. Telepathic Pokemon can project their thoughts to humans and Pokemon. The Pokemon can only read surface thoughts. Some species can only read emotions and will specify if that's the case. If a Pokemon learns the move Mind Reader or the ability Telepathy and does not have the telepath skill, they gain telepath.

Threaded.description: If a Pokemon has the threaded skill they may move around by shooting out silk webs or strong vines. A threaded movement is when a Pokemon targets an object less than 30 ft. away and shoots a strong, thin line of silk, or extends a vine from themselves, and then quickly retracts that silk or vine, pulling itself towards the object if the Pokemon is lighter than the object or pulling the object towards the Pokemon if the object is lighter than it is. If you target another Pokemon or person with a threaded movement, roll your accuracy check against their Speed stat. You may still use a move on the same turn you perform a threaded movement. If a Pokemon learns the move Electro Web, Power Whip, Spider Web, or Vine Whip or the stat passive String Shot, and does not have the threaded skill, they gain threaded.
Threaded.shortDescription: Can move around on spun threads or vines.

Tough Cookie.description: A tough cookie has it rough and is used to being knocked unconscious due to its frail constitution. If a Pokemon with Tough Cookie is knocked unconscious, the attacker must deal enough damage for the Tough Cookie to be at -25 HP or lower with the intention to kill in order to force a death saving throw. This only matters if you are playing with death saving throws.
Tough Cookie.shortDescription: Lowers the chance of a death saving throw.

Tracker.description: Pokemon with the skill tracker have a strong sense of smell that they can use to follow other Pokemon or people using an Investigate skill check, adding their Special Attack modifier. If the Pokemon has smelled whom they want to track in the past day, or one of their personal belongings, they can pursue that prey with a skill check of 11 or better. To pick up a random scent from nothing, a skill check of 16 or better will allow the Pokemon to follow that scent. To pick up a specific scent from nothing, a skill check of 20 will allow the Pokemon to follow that scent. A Pokemon may only make these checks once per hour. If a Pokemon learns the move Odor Sleuth and does not have the tracker Skill, they gain tracker.
Tracker.shortDescription: Can follow scents to track targets.

Wired.description: Wired Pokemon have a special relation to electronic devices. They can enter machines and travel through connected electronics through any cords that connect them instantly. While inside machines, they can read data on the machine or they can even take control of the machine on a programming skill check adding their Special Attack modifier.
Wired.shortDescription: Can enter and travel through electronics.

Zapper.description: Pokemon with the zapper skill can produce controlled electricity or send electrical currents through various conductive materials. If an electrical device is capable of being recharged, a Pokemon with zapper can recharge it to full power slowly. If a Pokemon learns the move Charge, Charge Beam, Discharge, Electrify, Electro Ball, Parabolic Charge, Shock Wave, Spark, Thunder, Thunder Fang, Thunder Punch, Thunder Shock, Thunder Wave, Thunderbolt, Volt Tackle, Wild Charge, or Zap Cannon and does not have the zapper skill, they gain zapper.

Cloak.description: Burmy's appearance changes depending on where it spends time. After ~10 minutes in a forest/jungle, desert/mountain, or city, it changes to Plant, Sandy, or Trash cloak respectively.

Collector.description: Gimmighoul can change into its Roaming form by abandoning its chest of gold pieces. With at least 50 gold pieces, it can revert to Chest form.
Collector.shortDescription: Can switch between Chest and Roaming forms based on gold coins.

Dancer.description: Oricorio's appearance and type change with nectars it drinks. Four forms: Baile (Fire), Pom-Pom (Electric), Pa'u (Psychic), Sensu (Ghost).
Dancer.shortDescription: Form and type change with nectars consumed.

Flower Bond.description: Bonded to a chosen flower from birth. The Pokemon draws energy from and cares for its flower throughout its life.
Flower Bond.shortDescription: Bonded to a flower from birth.

Gang Down.description: Squawkabilly can have Green, Blue, Yellow, or White plumage. These colors are determined at birth and never change.
Gang Down.shortDescription: Plumage color determined at birth and permanent.

Genetic Relation.description: Volbeat and Illumise are closely related; Volbeat can breed to produce Illumise.
Genetic Relation.shortDescription: Volbeat can breed to produce Illumise.

Mausfam.description: Maushold can have one to four tiny maus accompanying it. Those with 3 or 4 tiny maus are Small (Size).
Mausfam.shortDescription: Accompanied by 1-4 tiny maus; larger groups are Small size.

Pumpkin Sized.description: Comes in different sizes. The Pokemon's stats vary depending on its size.

Seasonal.description: Appearance changes depending on the current season of the year.

Segmented.description: Dudunsparce can have two to five middle segments. Those with 4 or 5 middle segments are Huge (Size).
Segmented.shortDescription: Body has 2-5 segments; 4-5 segments means Huge size.

Sushimorph.description: Tatsugiri has multiple fixed forms: Curly form is orange with darker orange on its back; Droopy form is pink with a white belly; Stretchy form is entirely yellow. Forms cannot be changed.
Sushimorph.shortDescription: Has three fixed color forms that cannot be changed.

Tall.description: Has Reach (melee range up to 25 ft.) due to extreme height, but can bend to occupy a Gigantic area instead. Indoors, must use Gigantic form.
Tall.shortDescription: Reach due to height; can occupy Gigantic area indoors.

Toppings.description: Alcremie's appearance varies based on what treats were mixed during evolution, creating many unique decorative forms.
Toppings.shortDescription: Appearance varies based on evolution ingredients.

Unown Melding.description: Up to six Unown can form one capturable entity. For every two Unown in the group, one base stat is randomly raised by +1. For every three Unown in the group, it gains an extra Hidden Power use.
Unown Melding.shortDescription: Up to 6 Unown merge into one entity with combined stat bonuses.

Unown Symbols.description: Unown have hundreds of unique forms resembling letters, petroglyphs, hieroglyphs, and scripts from around the world.

Wing Pattern.description: Vivillon's wing patterns vary by global location of birth. This indicates origin, not rarity.
Wing Pattern.shortDescription: Wing pattern determined by birthplace; not a rarity indicator.

Pikachu.name: Catastropika
Pikachu.effect: Move next to target; target Paralyzed on hit

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Vine Lash
gMaxMove.effect: Targets take 1d4 dmg when acting until Gigantamax ends.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Wildfire
gMaxMove.effect: Targets take 1d4 dmg when acting until Gigantamax ends.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Cannonade
gMaxMove.effect: Targets take 1d4 dmg when acting until Gigantamax ends.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Chi Strike
gMaxMove.effect: All allies within 60ft crit on natural 19+.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Replenish
gMaxMove.effect: All allies recover used berries (if available).

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Volcalith
gMaxMove.effect: Targets take 1d4 dmg when acting until Gigantamax ends.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Flavorful
gMaxMove.effect: All allies within 60ft cured of afflictions.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Snooze
gMaxMove.effect: Targets fall Asleep after next turn.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Gravitas
gMaxMove.effect: Creates Gravity Terrain (60ft, 2 mins). Pokemon cannot leave the ground.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Depletion
gMaxMove.effect: Targets cannot use their last-used move until Gigantamax ends.

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Stonesurge
gMaxMove.effect: Places 2 Stealth Rock hazards (2d12 auto-trigger to foes within 20ft, 2 mins).

gMaxMove.name: G-Max Steelsurge
gMaxMove.effect: Places Spike Hazard in blast area (foes lose 1/6 max HP, 2 mins).
